body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |

\- February 23rd, 2016 -
# **Thank You Nevada!**
| Dear Peter, Three wins in a row – New Hampshire, South Carolina, and now Nevada! Thank you for your support- I could not do it without you! We have traveled all over the country and met so many incredible voters, who have joined this movement. We will no longer be led by the all talk, no action politicians that have failed us all. Together, we are going to make the country better and stronger than ever before. Over the next two days, I will be in Virginia Beach, VA at Regent University for a Presidential Candidate Forum and participating in the CNN GOP Debate in Houston Texas. Over this weekend, we will be traveling to [Texas](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fdonald-j-trump-in-fort-worth-tx-tickets-22060100354&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=3), [Oklahoma](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fdonald-j-trump-in-oklahoma-city-tickets-22063276855&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=4), [Arkansas](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fdonald-j-trump-in-bentonville-ar-tickets-22065174531&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=5), [Tennessee](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fdonald-j-trump-in-millington-tn-tickets-22077319858&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=6), and [Alabama](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fdonald-j-trump-in-huntsville-al-tickets-22069721130&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=7). We are only one week away from Super Tuesday and early voting has begun in [Texas](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fvote%2Ftexas%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=8) and [Georgia](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fvote%2Fgeorgia%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=9) \- find your polling location at [DonaldJTrump.com/vote](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fvote&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=10) We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail. With your help, we will Make America Great Again! Best Wishes,
**Donald J. Trump**

P.S. Show your support with official Trump campaign merchandise: [http://shop.donaldjtrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nv_caucus&n=11)

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is a real problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

I think it's time we do something about it
about our $19 trillion dollar debt, don't you?

We need cuts.

We need reforms.

And I need to get to Washington for another
term to make sure I'm there to fight for them.

I believe one of my most important jobs in
the Senate is to rein in the wasteful spending in Washington.

I take my responsibility to expose waste and
save taxpayer dollars very seriously.

Our country cannot to continue business as
usual with the budget.

I've been labeled the "most frugal lawmaker
in Congress" and I'm happy to uphold that title.

Earlier this week I asked the budget
committee to include my findings from 'The Waste Report' in the
2017 budget.

We should be protected from waste. When the
government spends our money, we deserve to know exactly how it
was spent.

As it stands, the Federal Government has
racked up over $19 trillion in federal debt, over 100 percent of
our nation's Gross Domestic Product. That comes out to over
$60,000 per person alive today.

They've been spending $1000 here, and a
couple thousand there, adding up to billions wasted. And we have
to pay it back.

This is a real problem that cannot be
ignored.

During my time in the Senate, I've proposed
three budgets that balance within five years.

Today, I'm asking for your support to make
sure these critical proposals are put on the desk of the Budget
Committee in my next term.

I will continue to fight for taxpayers for
more oversight, more transparency, and less spending.

I hope I can count on you to stand with me
today to help make sure I am elected to another term for Kentucky
this November.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Ben Carson
subject: Peter, I need to shoot straight with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33757745:sZsqgbCNb:m:1:876315805:E469431FBE655742C4EA3F0638C509B5:r)
---

Peter,

This may be one of the more personal emails that you'll receive from me.

But as one of my most dedicated supporters, I need to shoot straight with you.

The four early-voting states -- Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada -- have all spoken, and we did not finish where we had hoped. While in many ways we've made history throughout this campaign, the results of these contests have definitely been disappointing.

But we must accept the reality of where we are and look forward, not back.

Our next opportunity is Super Tuesday on March 1st. It's a big deal. 12 states will be voting and a whopping 595 delegates -- nearly 25 percent of the total number -- will be rewarded. They are states where I should be very competitive; states like Georgia, Tennessee and Alabama.

Without a strong showing, it's going to be very tough for my campaign. That's the honest truth.

In my heart of hearts, I believe we have an opportunity to break through. With just 5 of the original 17 candidates remaining, there should now be more time to focus on ideas and solutions rather than just personalities. But we can only break through if we stick together.

Many in the political and media establishment are saying I have no path forward. They're now mocking me, calling for me to drop out, and in some cases even questioning my integrity by saying I'm only doing this for personal gain.

This just proves that they don't know or understand me. Then again, they never have.

Running for President was never on my bucket list. After a long and arduous career I was looking forward to retirement. But we are in danger of losing our country, and I care much more deeply about the future of my children and grandchildren than my own pleasure.

Hundreds of thousands of people from all walks of life urged me to run, and after much prayer I decided to move forward. Since then, millions more have joined me and we've made a much larger impact than any of the experts ever thought was possible.

I've put my heart and soul into this race and not once have I compromised my values and principles for political expediency -- and that's exactly how I would serve in the Oval Office.

[**So here's my request -- as we prepare for Super Tuesday, please make your first online donation of just $2. We have 12 states to cover and we must have a strong showing.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33757745:sZsqgbCNb:m:1:876315805:E469431FBE655742C4EA3F0638C509B5:r)

Peter, I'm committed to giving you a voice because it's been ignored for far too long.

Together we've built a movement of people from every part of the country and from every walk of life. We've brought new people into the political process, and brought many who had given up back into the fold. This campaign gave them hope for the future.

[**Now, more than ever before, I need your help. I need you to think back to the time you first signed up to join my campaign, and in that spirit please make a donation of just $2.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33757745:sZsqgbCNb:m:1:876315805:E469431FBE655742C4EA3F0638C509B5:r)

Thank you for joining me in this fight for our values, and for the future of this exceptional nation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

subject: less than a week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
The momentum going into the March 1st "Super Tuesday" primaries is in our favor. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33758003:soj88uCkN:m:1:1104269936:FAD9585FE45DFC99751A6113ABEC7B80:r)
---
Friend,

**The momentum going into the March 1st "Super Tuesday" primaries is in our favor.**

But I need you now more than ever before.

Here's the good news: I'm leading all Republicans in Arkansas and Texas, and we are in striking distance of Trump and ahead of the other remaining candidates in five more key March 1st, Super Tuesday states -- Alabama, Alaska, Georgia, Oklahoma, and Tennessee.

As you can see -- this is quickly becoming a two person race between me, a consistent conservative...and Donald Trump.

Because Super Tuesday is so important -- I've created our **Super Tuesday Victory Fund** to ensure I have the resources to win on March 1st, and keep us on track to win this nomination.

But as of this morning..._**I am $945,320 short of fully funding it.**_

[**Please, can you help me close the gap and make a special one-time gift to my Super Tuesday Victory Fund to support our volunteers who are already on the ground?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33758003:soj88uCkN:m:1:1104269936:FAD9585FE45DFC99751A6113ABEC7B80:r)

I know you can't make up the whole shortfall, [**but can I count on you to make a special, one-time donation of $50, $25, or even $5?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33758003:soj88uCkN:m:1:1104269936:FAD9585FE45DFC99751A6113ABEC7B80:r)

I know it's a lot to ask for...but I also know it's the only way.

No matter what the Washington Cartel and the liberal media throws at me, I will always be a consistent conservative -- both in word and deed.

You will never have to worry about me caving to the Washington Establishment, and I will work as hard as I can to win this campaign and reignite liberty in our nation.

I am only here today because of you, and I can only compete tomorrow if you continue with me.

Friend, this is our time.

We are just getting started on the road to winning the nomination.

[**Will you make a one-time gift to my Super Tuesday Victory Fund right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33758003:soj88uCkN:m:1:1104269936:FAD9585FE45DFC99751A6113ABEC7B80:r)

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

Here's the good news: I'm leading all Republicans in Arkansas and Texas, and we are in striking distance of Trump and ahead of the other remaining candidates in five more key March 1st, Super Tuesday states -- Alabama, Alaska, Georgia, Oklahoma, and Tennessee. As you can see -- this is quickly becoming a two person race between me, a consistent conservative...and Donald Trump. Because Super Tuesday is so important -- I've created our Super Tuesday Victory Fund to ensure I have the resources to win on March 1st, and keep us on track to win this nomination. But as of this morning...I am $945,320 short of fully funding it. I know you can't make up the whole shortfall, I know it's a lot to ask for...but I also know it's the only way. No matter what the Washington Cartel and the liberal media throws at me, I will always be a consistent conservative -- both in word and deed. You will never have to worry about me caving to the Washington Establishment, and I will work as hard as I can to win this campaign and reignite liberty in our nation. I am only here today because of you, and I can only compete tomorrow if you continue with me. Friend, this is our time. We are just getting started on the road to winning the nomination. subject: Want to win?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, poll after poll not only shows that I'm the Republican candidate most likely to defeat Hillary Clinton, but that I'll also defeat Trump in Ohio.

Two recent polls show that in a head-to-head race, **I'd defeat Hillary by** 11 points and 9 points nationally.

Another poll shows that **I'd defeat Hillary in Ohio by** 17 points **and Trump by** 18 points. You can't win the White House or the nomination without winning Ohio.
**
**
**Our positive message is working but it's critical that we do well in the March states to gain the delegates and momentum we'll need**. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Why a moratorium: 44 fracking sites cited in one day
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197fe/3476a20e/c55e8d6/27451a91/2659329410/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Undermanned and underequipped, it took PA state regulators years to finally discover the 44 violations reported yesterday from just one fracking company for failing to clean up their drilling sites within 9 months. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197fe/3476a20e/c55e8d6/27451a90/2659329410/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0224FBb1&amounts=15,30,70,125,160,260,500")
---

**The worst part? The violations were triggered by the company's response to a question asked last summer - not through actual inspection of the sites. **
As I learned in the Navy, you can only "expect what you inspect." Our leaders continue to ignore this dictum, and it's part of the reason **why I have supported a moratorium on fracking.**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197fe/3476a20e/c55e8d6/27451a9f/2659329410/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0224FBb2&amounts=15,30,70,125,160,260,500")
---
Please watch the below video from the first debate of this election, where I explained why I am still in favor of a moratorium on fracking - **then please contribute what you can so that I can protect the people 's land, water, air, and health in the U.S. Senate.**

Joe

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: The differences between Senator Sanders and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I think these votes mattered. | Friend --

Last night was my final scheduled town hall with Senator Sanders before Super Tuesday. **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in $1 right now to fight by my side.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ4MDU5OTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0MDc3MTQ5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I did my best to make you proud last night, and to highlight some of the real differences in our campaigns:

In 2007, Senator Ted Kennedy made a valiant effort to pass immigration reform -- I stood with him and voted for that bill. Senator Sanders voted against it.

This week, families from Sandy Hook are in court suing the manufacturer of the gun that killed their children, challenging the law that gives gun-makers legal immunity. I voted against that law. Senator Sanders voted for it.

And right now, Senator Sanders is running a campaign based largely on a single issue -- but I don’t think we’re a single-issue country. We need a president who will break down the barriers facing all Americans, from economic inequality to systemic racism, sexism, and homophobia.

**I’m going to keep fighting my heart out to win every vote, and I need you to fight with me. All it takes is $1 to show me you’re ready to win this nomination, win the White House, and make history:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ4MDU5OTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0MDc3MTQ5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: An uncomfortable truth about Donald Trump
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Given the state of the Republican presidential race, it's time to acknowledge a very uncomfortable truth: Donald Trump is probably going to be the Republican nominee.
**The question for Democrats is simple. Who has the best chance to defeat Trump? And by any objective measure, the answer is Bernie Sanders.** In almost every recent head-to-head poll against Trump, Bernie leads by a wide margin while Hillary Clinton either trails or is within the margin of error. Take a look at these recent polling averages:
**Huffington Post Average of Recent Polls**
Sanders: 51% to Trump: 41%
Clinton: 48% to Trump: 44%
We have momentum, we have one less pledged delegate than Hillary Clinton, and we're closing the gap in the national polls. But with 26 primaries and caucuses in the next three weeks, Bernie needs you now:
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign today. It could mean the difference between victory and defeat -- between taking back our country from the billionaire class, or President Donald Trump.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/taking-on-trump?refcode=em160224v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/taking-on-trump?refcode=em160224v2-full")
The truth is, it's going to take more than establishment politics and establishment thinking to beat Donald Trump.
But together, we are building something unprecedented. That is why we're doing so well in the polls, and why we've seen grassroots enthusiasm unmatched by any candidate on either side of this primary. Only Trump comes close. And that is why what we are building is what will be required to defeat him.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/taking-on-trump?refcode=em160224v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/taking-on-trump?refcode=em160224v2-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Yesterday, Donald Trump won the Nevada caucus.

He’s gone 3-for-4 in the first contests, which means we have to wrap our heads around the idea that he could seriously be the Republican nominee -- the man who says Mexicans are criminals and that Muslims should be banned from entering America. body:
| Friends,

Add _Bloomberg Government_ to the long list of media outlets that say control of the Senate will come down to Florida: | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2297/738133e4/34ecd141/7f83c18d/691667214/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160224?refcode=pme160224_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
**Control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court could very well hinge on which party wins Marco Rubio 's seat. Let's make sure it's ours.**

[**With only 5 days left in February, we 're coming in short of our $30,000 goal. Can you take a minute to chip in a few bucks to help?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2297/738133e4/34ecd141/7f83c18d/691667214/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160224?refcode=pme160224_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Things will happen in this race that we can't change. We can't stop the special interests from attacking me. We can't stop my opponents from distorting my record.

**But whether or not we can fight back is up to us.** In a top-tier competitive race like this one, with so much at stake, we have to be at the very top of our game.

**We absolutely cannot risk missing this goal.**

[**Rush in your contribution before time runs out. Give $5 or more today -- every generous gift matters.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2297/738133e4/34ecd141/7f83c18d/691667214/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160224?refcode=pme160224_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you for all your support.

Patrick

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2297/738133e4/34ecd141/7f83c18e/691667214/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Corry Bliss
subject: FWD: Less than 12 hours
body:
| Peter \--

Did you see Rob’s message today? We are now only $2,140 away from reaching our goal, but we only have until midnight. It’s now or never, Peter. [Donate now to help us defeat Hillary Clinton and Ted Strickland](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=1 "Donate Here!"). Together, we can win in Ohio! Thank you for your support, Peter. We’ll add your name to our wall if you donate! [Donate by clicking here](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=2 "Donate Here!"). Corry Bliss

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Rob Portman <robportman@robportman.com>
Date: Tue, Feb 24th, 2016 at 12:00 PM
Subject: Less than 12 hours left
To: Corry Bliss <corrybliss@robportman.com>

Corry \-- We are so close. We’re only $4,036 short of our goal, but our deadline is at midnight tonight. With your help, I am confident we can win this election and stop Ted Strickland and Hillary Clinton from winning Ohio. **I only have 12 hours left to meet our deadline.** Any donation will help us reach our goal. Even as little as $3. [Will you donate to my campaign right now](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=3)? | [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=4) | [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=5)

Thank you for your help, Corry. Remember to donate before the deadline this evening. [You can donate by clicking here](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=11)[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_eom_06&n=12).
All best,

Rob Portman

name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: Final stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- In less than one week, the voters will finally have their voices heard by Richard Shelby, who has refused to stand up and answer for his abysmal record and dirty campaign. As we make our final push, every dollar helps us get the word out to Alabamians — can you help? [ **Chip in and help us cross the finish line, Friend** ](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fmcconnell-for-senate-final-stretch%3Fsc%3D20160224-f&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160224_f&n=1) Your contribution will, among other things, help us go door-to-door with grassroots supporters, print campaign flyers, and help folks get to the polls — these are essential to putting Richard Shelby into retirement. Will you help us cross the finish line? — Jonathan

---
Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by conservatives like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/contact?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160224_f&n=2) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/unsubscribe?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160224_f&n=3) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2FMcConnell2016&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160224_f&n=4) or [Twitter](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fmcconnell2016&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160224_f&n=5).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help take on and defeat the Washington Establishment.**

Friends of Jonathan McConnell, 2127 14th Ave S, Birmingham, AL 35205, United States.
